description_long: This kiosk features a geometric, angular layout with multiple partitioned panels arranged on a textured, dark red platform. The panels are a mix of solid black and printed surfaces, some displaying maps, graphics, or informational content, suggesting an exhibition or informational function. The structure is open on several sides, allowing easy access and visibility from multiple directions, with no enclosed roof or walls. The flooring is patterned with raised triangular and linear motifs, adding a tactile and visual interest. There is a prominent sign or logo suspended above the kiosk, rendered in a matching red color, which appears to spell out a name or brand. The overall design is modern and modular, with a focus on accessibility and visual communication.
description: A modern, open kiosk with angular black and printed panels on a textured red platform, featuring a suspended red sign above. The structure is accessible from multiple sides and designed for informational or exhibition use.
description_view_0: From this view, the kiosk's open layout and the arrangement of black and printed panels are visible, along with the suspended red sign above and the patterned red flooring.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the printed informational panels and the open entry points, as well as the angular cut of the platform's edge.
description_view_2: Here, the black panels dominate the foreground, with the printed panels and the suspended sign visible in the background, emphasizing the kiosk's modular partitioning.
description_view_3: This view shows the rear and side of the kiosk, with more focus on the printed panels and the open, accessible design.
attribute_signage_type: 3D printed sign suspended above the kiosk, matching the platform color, with stylized text or logo.
attribute_door_configuration: none; open entryways on multiple sides
attribute_roof_design: none; open-air with no roof structure
